_comment: Reviewed require overrides + excludes for DeriveGatedAreas.ts, produced by a 5-way subagent pass over every gated-door script (problems.txt #9). Keyed by ScanDoors source-door loc. `require` overrides the auto-parser (bitfield gates, Thieving-level locked doors, `!`/compound conditions); `exclude:true` drops doors that aren't real progression gates (agility cooldowns, board-game ranks, intra-quest puzzle levers, non-door interactables, doors that open unconditionally). Bit indices resolved from each quest's .constant file.

lgancientwalldoor.note: Legends' Quest rune-placement puzzle solved (persistent bit).

elemental_workshop_air_lever.reason: intra-quest puzzle lever, not a passage door

elemental_workshop_water_lever.reason: intra-quest puzzle lever, not a passage door

famcrest_doorg2h1.reason: Family Crest maze lever-combination door (resettable puzzle state)

famcrest_doorh2.reason: Family Crest maze lever-combination door (resettable puzzle state)

famcrest_doorh2g1.reason: Family Crest maze lever-combination door (resettable puzzle state)

famcrest_doori2h1.reason: Family Crest maze lever-combination door (opens via puzzle levers mid-quest)

viking_bullmountedhead.reason: not a door - quest-item source (mounted head), bit only marks disk taken

viking_unimountedhead.reason: not a door - quest-item source (mounted head), bit only marks disk taken

cavewitch_door.note: Underground Pass: cat dropped to distract witch.

ctratgatec.note: Clock Tower: rats killed, door shaken loose.

golrie_gate_waterfall_quest.note: Real gate is the key; the tested bit is transient Golrie-locked-in state.

jewellersdoor.reason: door opens unconditionally; the quest bit only controls NPC spawning

bedabin_tentdoor.note: Tourist Trap: tent access granted. True condition also has an upper stage bound (<learned_darts) not expressible here.

ganothbattlement.note: Watchtower: both ogre-market progress bits set.

elvarg_gate_left.note: Crandor access (sailed to Crandor). Vanilla blocks EXIT only; gte reflects being on Crandor at all.

loc_2653.note: Murder Mystery started (search handler, guards' permission).

troll_stronghold_entrance.note: Troll Stronghold: freed Godric (or back-exit already opened).

garvdoor.note: Heroes' Quest, Black Arm path, mansion stage.

grubordoor.note: Heroes' Quest, Black Arm HQ door stage.

herokitchendoor.note: Heroes' Quest, Phoenix path, talked to Alfonse.

loc_2854.note: Hazeel Cult, evil side, side-task done. Upper stage bound (<complete) not expressible.

watchleverup.reason: quest-completion lever, not an area-entry door

shantay_prisondoor.reason: metal gate opens unconditionally; quest branch only handles the jail-fine dialogue

horror_far_right_door.note: Horror from the Deep: all six altar booleans set before the wall moves.

biowatchtower.reason: not a door - Biohazard quest interaction object (throw birdfeed)

fightarena_door1.note: Fight Arena: obtained-armour stage. Vanilla also needs the worn khazard disguise (helmet OR platemail) - the OR-item isn't expressible, so gated on the quest stage alone (looser, avoids false-bounce).

viking_bard_backstage_door.note: Fremennik/Olaf: strung lyre, quest-in-progress window (proc-based bound not expressible).

whistledoor.reason: door opens unconditionally; napkin/whistle condition only spawns loot

zanarisdoor.note: Lost City: dramen staff. Also handled as a gated entrance in ap-entrances.json; harmless overlap.

gate_gnomeball_game.reason: gate opens unconditionally; ball condition confiscates the ball, not a requirement

mournerstewdoorup.note: Mourner HQ disguise (worn); entering side only.

troll_stronghold_prison_door_closed.note: First pass needs the key; once troll_quest>=entered_prison it opens freely.

barbarian_obstacle_pipe.note: Barbarian course pipe: hard Agility 35 (the pipe_used fragment is just a reuse cooldown).

barbarian_rope_swing.reason: reuse cooldown + success-roll only, no hard requirement

obstical_pipe4.note: Yanille agility dungeon pipe: hard Agility 49.

upass_pipe4.reason: reuse cooldown only, no stat/item requirement

upass_pipe6.reason: reuse cooldown only; quest state only changes teleport distance
